name: Crisp Split Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and sort the peas, then place in a large bowl and add enough cold water to cover.
2. Stir in baking soda. Let soak overnight.
3. Drain peas, rinse several times in cold water, and drain thoroughly.
4. Let stand at least 30 minutes; spread out on paper towels and let dry thoroughly.
5. Heat about 2 inches of oil to 350°F (180°C) or until a 1-inch bread cube turns golden brown in about 65 seconds.
6. Add peas, a portion at a time, and cook until golden. Be careful when cooking peas; even when completely dry, they often cause oil to bubble to the top of the pan.
7. Remove peas from hot oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Turn cooked peas into a small bowl. Sprinkle with chili powder, coriander, cinnamon, cloves, and salt; mix to coat peas with spice mixture.
9. Cool completely; store in an airtight container until ready to serve.
Makes about 1-3/4 cups.
